title: Knightcore
description: Knightcore is a library mod that contains common classes needed for mods created by MK.
body:
**Knightcore** is a split-off library mod to hold common classes and methods used in current and planned mods by MK, aka CryptidSeabird.

*Current features include:*
* Common core class with custom attributes for modded bows.
* Custom FOV handler for modded bows.
* Custom draw-time event handler for modded bows.

*Knightcore is available currently for:*
* Minecraft 1.19.2 / Forge 43.2+
* Minecraft 1.18.2 / Forge 40.2+
